moments.title: England vs Mexico World Cup Showdown
moments.blurb: England faces co-hosts Mexico in a crucial World Cup Round of 16 match at the Estadio Azteca on Sunday, July 5th, with a hostile welcome for the Three Lions in Mexico City.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: England vs Mexico in the World Cup Round of 16 tomorrow! The Three Lions received a hostile welcome in Mexico City. Can they silence the home crowd at the Azteca? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: It's do or die for England against Mexico in the World Cup Round of 16 this Sunday! Where will you be watching the big game?

moments.title: Mumford & Sons Headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Folk-rock favourites Mumford & Sons are headlining British Summer Time Hyde Park today, Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Live Today
angles.copy: It's happening! Mumford & Sons are bringing their anthems to BST Hyde Park TODAY. Who's there for a singalong?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: That Saturday feeling at BST Hyde Park as Mumford & Sons take the stage! Expect big folk-rock energy in London tonight.

moments.title: Duran Duran at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: New Wave legends Duran Duran headline British Summer Time Hyde Park on Sunday, July 5th, with support from Scissor Sisters, Nile Rodgers & Chic, and Melanie C.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Headliner
angles.copy: Get ready, New Romantics! Duran Duran are headlining BST Hyde Park tomorrow, Sunday, July 5th. Which classic are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Star-studded Lineup
angles.copy: Sunday at BST Hyde Park is stacked! Duran Duran, Scissor Sisters, Nile Rodgers & Chic and Melanie C all on one stage. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, scheduled for July 10-12 in Finsbury Park, London, was cancelled on April 7th after Ye's Electronic Travel Authorisation was withdrawn, leaving no other acts booked.

angles.name: Cancellation Reminder
angles.copy: Wireless Festival would have been kicking off next Friday with Ye headlining, but was cancelled back in April. Still a talking point for London festival-goers!

angles.name: Missed Opportunity
angles.copy: No Wireless Festival this year after the cancellation. A big miss for hip-hop and R&B fans in London next weekend!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the No. 1 spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a 15th nonconsecutive week, as announced yesterday.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' makes it 15 nonconsecutive weeks at the top of the Official UK Singles Chart. Incredible run!

angles.name: British Talent
angles.copy: Huge for British music! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean continue their chart domination with 'Rein Me In' at No. 1. What a track!

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 is in full swing, airing nightly (except Saturdays) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with 'Unseen Bits' on Saturdays.

angles.name: Weekend Catch Up
angles.copy: It's Saturday, which means 'Unseen Bits' from the Love Island villa tonight! Who's your favourite islander so far this season?

angles.name: Daily Fix
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island UK Season 13? The drama continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX. Who do you think will couple up next?

moments.title: John Waite Turns 74
moments.blurb: English rock musician John Waite, known for 'Missing You' and his work with The Babys and Bad English, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to John Waite! The voice behind 'Missing You' and frontman of The Babys and Bad English. Still sounds incredible today.

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: American rapper and singer Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles', celebrates his 31st birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone, turning 31 today! From 'White Iverson' to global superstar, what's your favourite Posty track?

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News and known for hits like 'The Power of Love', celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Birthday Eve
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate a true 80s icon! Huey Lewis turns 76 tomorrow. What's your go-to Huey Lewis & The News hit?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent, famous for 'In Da Club' and 'Candy Shop', celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Go, shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your all-time favourite 50 Cent track?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday. A true icon of rock and roll. #TheBeatles

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American musician Beck, known for his eclectic style and hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the incredibly innovative Beck on Wednesday! What's your favourite album from this genre-bending artist?

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, lead vocalist of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love on Thursday! A true icon of grunge and alternative rock.

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: American musician Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes and for his extensive solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Innovator
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to The Raconteurs, a modern guitar hero.

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: American guitarist and songwriter Richie Sambora, best known as the former lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on Friday, July 11th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi's iconic former guitarist, Richie Sambora, this Friday! What's your favourite riff he played?

moments.title: Scottish & Northern Irish School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Schools in Scotland (from June 29 - July 11) and Northern Ireland (from July 1 - Sept 1) are beginning their summer holidays this week, while England and Wales follow later in July.

angles.name: Summer Break Starts
angles.copy: Schools out for summer! Many pupils in Scotland and Northern Ireland are now officially on their summer holidays. What are your plans?

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: While some UK schools are already on summer break, England and Wales are still counting down to mid-July! Where's top of your holiday wish list?

moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals begin on Thursday, July 9th, with matches scheduled across different US cities.

angles.name: Quarter Final Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup Quarter-Finals kick off on Thursday! Who are your picks to make it through to the semis?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Big week for football fans! The World Cup Quarter-Finals are here. Get ready for some thrilling knockout action!
